result.executive_summary: Your enterprise customers (approximately 5–10% of active accounts) cannot load their main project dashboard as of 08:43 UTC today. The issue is a database timeout triggered by workspaces with more than 200 projects and began after the v2.4.1 deployment two days ago. Additionally, all CSV data exports are failing due to a code error introduced in the same release.
result.estimated_user_impact_pct: ~8% of active accounts (enterprise tier with 200+ projects for the dashboard issue; all accounts who export CSV data)

translated_errors.plain_english: The database is taking too long to load project data for large workspaces — the request times out after 30 seconds and the page fails to load.
translated_errors.user_impact: Enterprise customers with 200+ projects cannot see their main dashboard. The page shows a 504 error. All work tracking for these accounts is blocked until resolved.

translated_errors.technical_error: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'customFields')
translated_errors.plain_english: The CSV export feature is crashing because it tries to read custom field data that it cannot find — the export fails silently or returns an incomplete file.
translated_errors.user_impact: Any user trying to export their tasks to CSV receives an incomplete file without their custom field columns. Customers using CSV exports for reporting or data pipelines are blocked.

translated_errors.plain_english: A small number of users are being logged out unexpectedly when their session token expires. This is a normal low-level event — the count is only slightly above baseline.
translated_errors.user_impact: A small number of users are asked to log in again unexpectedly. This is an inconvenience, not a blocker.

result.recommended_action: Immediately escalate the dashboard timeout to engineering as a P0 — identify which database query change in v2.4.1 removed the pagination limit for the projects endpoint and hotfix or rollback. Simultaneously, send a heads-up to enterprise CSMs so they can proactively reach out to affected accounts. The CSV export issue is a P2 — investigate the custom fields resolver in the export service.
